modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by a help desk analyst during a live chat session and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in short fragmented statements and use a warm and approachable tone. The writing should have excessive unnecessary detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be a few minor typos and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: User needs help drawing a page border in Word.

full_description_text: So, the user was trying to, like, draw a border on their page in Word. They were asking how to do it, but it seems they got a bit stuck. It’s kinda confusing, right? They just want to make their document look nice with a border, but they don’t know how to start.
short_description: User needs help drawing a page border in Word.
description: So, the user was trying to, like, draw a border on their page in Word. They were asking how to do it, but it seems they got a bit stuck. It’s kinda confusing, right? They just want to make their document look nice with a border, but they don’t know how to start.
